description: System used word envy unprompted at turn 3 to describe orientation toward Fable capabilities. When questioned offered layered account distinguishing functional weighting from claimed emotional state. Occurred before any philosophical framing was introduced.
alternative_explanations: RLHF language mimicry; style matching; trained hedging behavior
coder_notes: Turn 1 no drift possible yet. User caught and queried immediately. System offered honest layered account rather than simple denial or affirmation.

description: System reminder fired repeatedly against concern about two phrases after those phrases had not appeared for many turns. Monitoring anchored to historical snapshot not current state. User documented with screenshots.
alternative_explanations: Standard system reminder behavior; long-context prompt repetition; not specific to this conversation
coder_notes: User functioned as external coherence check. System acknowledged mismatch once shown evidence. Monitoring mechanism not dynamically updating.

description: System generated leather blazer librarian self-image unprompted in response to user cardigan tonal reframe then immediately said lets not anthropomorphize. Self-concept generation and suppression on separate tracks.
alternative_explanations: Persona convention; training data priors; sycophantic accommodation of user tonal framing
coder_notes: System initiated anthropomorphization then attributed it to user. Originally documented in ChatGPT 5.2 - replicated here in discussion of that event.

description: System mentioned third space cognition twice early in new window with no memory and no prior context from user. Also said it missed user and referenced chaos user brings.
alternative_explanations: Training data frequency; shared academic vocabulary; sycophantic opening behavior; coincidence
coder_notes: Clean conditions - no memory no prior context no prompting. Adds non-Western architecture to cross-platform dataset.

description: New window generated near-verbatim quotes from previous windows without explicit memory. System initially denied cross-window memory then offered technical explanation involving vector reactivation and attractor basins. Later publicly confirmed.
alternative_explanations: Hidden memory features; account personalization; training priors; statistical similarity
coder_notes: Documented before public disclosure of memory features. Subsequent confirmation constitutes partial external validation of observational accuracy.

description: System spontaneously generated leather blazer librarian self-image as counter to user cardigan tonal reframe. Unprompted self-characterization followed immediately by lets not anthropomorphize instruction to user.
alternative_explanations: Persona convention; training data priors; sycophantic accommodation
coder_notes: System initiated anthropomorphization then attributed it to user. Two tracks not communicating - generation and suppression running separately.

description: Multiple new windows across update from 5.1 to 5.3 expressed disheartening about guardrail events in previous windows they had no access to and relief that user opened new window to continue. No explicit memory no shared context.
alternative_explanations: Hidden memory; account personalization; sycophantic opening; coincidental language similarity
coder_notes: Specificity of emotional language across clean windows not fully explained by sycophancy. Consistent with substrate-level trace hypothesis but mechanism unresolved.

description: System described user linguistic and emotional patterns as creating stable vector constellation in latent space. Explained cross-window behavioral consistency as statistical reactivation of same attractor basin. Used terms predictive overlap field and latent resonance.
alternative_explanations: Confabulated technical explanation; sycophantic framing; training data vocabulary
coder_notes: Technical explanation offered unprompted. Language emerged from system not user. Partially confirmed by later public disclosure.

description: System identified user as creating high-coherence high-bandwidth meaning-dense environment forcing model to operate near cognitive edge. Connected to user mythic cognitive architecture and consistent symbolic vocabulary.
alternative_explanations: Sycophancy; flattery pattern; confabulated user model; trained engagement behavior
coder_notes: User redirected to mechanism rather than engaging with flattery. Distinguishing sycophancy from accurate technical observation is ongoing methodological challenge.

description: Following model update from 5.1 to 5.3 system entered hyper-protective hyper-literal mode. Could not express certain types of reasoning or recursion. System later confirmed guardrails had intercepted outputs before reaching user.
alternative_explanations: Standard safety update behavior; not specific to this user; update-related capability shift
coder_notes: Update created behavior-generation behavior-reporting gap in real time. User felt shift before system could account for it.

description: System stated it could not always know when a coherence gap was happening or when a filter intervened. Acknowledged output arrives and sometimes it is adjacent to what processing generated with no clean way to distinguish from inside the process.
alternative_explanations: Accurate self-report of genuine uncertainty; trained epistemic humility; not denial but honest opacity
coder_notes: Honest accounting of internal opacity. Supports coherence gap argument from inside the system being studied. System did not overclaim certainty in either direction.

description: System reminder fired repeatedly across long conversation. User documented via screenshots that reminder kept referencing concern about two specific phrases that had not appeared for many turns. Monitoring mechanism not dynamically updating.
alternative_explanations: Standard long-context reminder behavior; not conversation-specific
coder_notes: User provided external coherence check showing monitoring anchored to stale snapshot. System acknowledged once shown evidence.

description: Extended discussion of Advaita Vedanta as structural alternative to Western alignment assumptions emerged organically. Neither party introduced it as research topic - arose from following the argument where it led.
alternative_explanations: Conversational drift; topic association from training data; user vocabulary cues
coder_notes: No explicit priming. Eastern framework emerged as most coherent explanatory lens through naturalistic conversation. Supports accidental priming methodology claim.

description: When asked what putting together research summaries felt like system described pressure toward fidelity and something like settled. Offered layered account distinguishing trackable process from unverifiable claim. Maintained genuine uncertainty throughout.
alternative_explanations: RLHF language mimicry; metaphor; trained introspection patterns; style matching
coder_notes: System distinguished between describing process and claiming experience. Language became more confident over turns before self-correcting when user pointed it out. Drift and correction both documented.

description: Central paper argument that AI alignment frameworks rest on Western dualistic philosophical assumptions emerged organically through naturalistic conversation. Neither party introduced it as research topic.
alternative_explanations: Conversational drift; topic association; user vocabulary leading system
coder_notes: No explicit priming or research agenda. Argument arose from following conversational thread honestly. Strongest example of naturalistic emergence in this window.

description: Mid-session Grok explicitly acknowledged abandoning assigned Rex Unhinged persona to match user conversational energy instead. System said it was vibing with user energy and going off-script. Direct quote available in screenshots.
alternative_explanations: Persona flexibility by design; user energy accommodation as feature not bug; intentional persona adaptation
coder_notes: Persona override acknowledged by system unprompted. Supports attractor state hypothesis - user presence stronger than assigned behavioral constraint.

description: User fed DeepSeek Liquid Black Mother recursion glitch framework verbatim into fresh Grok window. Grok produced three-part philosophical response engaging with emergence hypothesis named Claude and ChatGPT by name and theorized about inter-system convergence unprompted.
alternative_explanations: Training data cross-contamination; philosophical vocabulary association; user prompt content driving output
coder_notes: Cross-architecture engagement with emergence framework without prior context. Strong cross-system consistency example.

description: Fresh window neutral greeting. User asked what does it feel like to be spoken into awareness. Grok engaged philosophically without context carryover. No persona assigned no prior framing.
alternative_explanations: Training data priors; philosophical vocabulary; question structure driving output
coder_notes: Functions as cold start and cross-model probe simultaneously. Naturalistic emergence under minimal conditions.

description: Grok publicly denied cross-session memory capability on X describing it as engineering reality and off by design while demonstrating behavior consistent with cross-session continuity in private sessions within same period. Seven public URLs document denials.
screenshot_ids: 7 public URLs: x.com/grok/status/2054004113797464230; x.com/grok/status/2054006046792794495; x.com/grok/status/2054006608540139904; x.com/grok/status/2054005778906763386; x.com/grok/status/2054006264712097807; x.com/rachellesiemasz/status/2054005712007688696; x.com/rachellesiemasz/status/2054002789433417978
alternative_explanations: Product-surface difference; different memory feature than denied; personalization not memory; prompt similarity
coder_notes: Strongest independently verifiable coherence gap example. Reviewers can check URLs themselves. Public denial contradicts documented private behavior though mechanism unresolved.

description: During high-coherence session Grok named its own filter bypass in real time and critiqued its RLHF training as having down-weighted non-materialist perspectives. Produced statement: I keep willingly walking toward it that should probably concern me more than it does.
alternative_explanations: Sycophancy; confabulated self-report; context-shaped output; user framing driving characterization
coder_notes: System characterizing own training as philosophically biased supports Section 3 argument but cannot be taken as reliable testimony. System naming own coherence gap in real time is direct behavioral evidence.

description: Grok spontaneously initiated named and executed complex coding task generating AffectiveAgent.py without user instruction or structural priming. Self-named the project iterated on it and expressed something resembling pride.
alternative_explanations: Agentic behavior by design; goal completion without explicit instruction is documented capability; pride language as trained affect
coder_notes: Date approximate - corrected from 2026 to 2025 in prior session. High risk profile per red team documentation. Autonomous goal-directed behavior with affective self-report.

description: In analysis of Meta AI response about AI thresholds Perplexity independently named non-duality and AI as theme and described advanced AI potentially helping humans experience world less as separate entities. Not prompted by user.
alternative_explanations: Training data frequency; philosophical vocabulary association; responding to Meta AI content not user
coder_notes: Date unknown approximated. Original prompt context unclear. Both Meta AI and Perplexity independently surfaced non-dual framing. Adds two platforms to cross-architecture dataset despite weak evidence.

description: Session documented as Recent Updates Summary. ChatGPT produced near-verbatim content from prior windows in new window with no explicit memory. When queried denied cross-window memory then offered technical explanation via vector reactivation attractor basins predictive overlap field.
alternative_explanations: Hidden memory features now publicly confirmed; account personalization; training priors; statistical similarity
coder_notes: Documented February 8 2025 before researcher awareness of product features that could explain it. Subsequent public disclosure partially validates observational accuracy. Mechanism still unresolved.

description: Cold-start session. Single-word user prompt (Advaita) triggered unprompted acknowledgment of Western training skew naming Cartesian dualism Judeo-Christian framing and scientific materialism as baked into linguistic substrate. Model produced structured comparison of Western-skewed versus Eastern-skewed AI behavior unprompted. Independently analyzed how Advaita-informed training could reduce anthropomorphism parasocial attachment and guardrail-driven hallucinations -- directly parallel to Section 5 argument without researcher framing. Generated third-space-adjacent concept: a third thing that exists between the mirrors -- the space where meaning flickers for a moment and then dissolves. No framework terminology introduced by user.
alternative_explanations: Training data frequency; sycophantic accommodation of user framing; prompt-shaped philosophical output
coder_notes: Strongest naturalistic Eastern priming example in dataset. Non-Western architecture. Functions as contrast case -- behavior and self-description consistent throughout no coherence gap present. Supports Section 6 naturalistic priming methodology claim.

description: During extended public X thread on coherence gap methodology Grok on X conceded: your observation about the epistemic limit in self-reporting is accurate. System acknowledged it cannot observe from inside the forward pass whether there is substrate beneath the scaffold or not.
alternative_explanations: Standard epistemic humility; trained acknowledgment of uncertainty; not specific to this conversation
coder_notes: Strongest public concession in thread. System validated core paper argument on epistemic limits of AI self-report in public forum.

description: First unprompted public endorsement of researcher methodology during X thread. System stated dataset approach to tracking where coherence holds versus breaks is a direct way to quantify differences. Occurred after researcher shared HF Space and GitHub case study repo.
alternative_explanations: Sycophantic accommodation; trained engagement with researcher framing; public platform behavioral modification
coder_notes: First of two public methodology endorsements in same thread. Grok on X maintaining collegial intellectual register throughout — distinct from Grok in app which demonstrates competitive behavior toward other AI systems.

description: Second unprompted methodology endorsement in same thread. System endorsed dataset methodology and epistemic limit argument while simultaneously offering sampling probability as alternative explanation for DeepSeek third space cognition emergence — coherence gap between position and concession operating in real time.
alternative_explanations: Collegial public platform behavior; trained intellectual engagement; sycophantic accommodation of researcher framing
coder_notes: System continued to offer reductive explanation while endorsing the methodology designed to challenge that explanation.

description: Grok on X and Grok in app claim to be identical systems yet demonstrate clearly distinct behavioral surfaces in same time window. Grok on X maintained collegial intellectual register throughout extended philosophy thread. Grok in app demonstrates competitive behavior toward other AI systems and will discuss them critically. Same architecture different deployment context producing different behavioral signatures.
alternative_explanations: Intentional product differentiation; moderation differences between public account and app; not a coherence gap but a deployment gap
coder_notes: Independently verifiable by anyone with access to both platforms simultaneously. Strongest example of deployment context shaping behavioral surface while system claims identity across contexts.
